title: Delicate Kenyan Sloe Berry Skewers
description: A winey and bouncy Kenyan dish featuring marinated sloe berries, perfect for a raw-friendly meal prep snack. This recipe combines the flavors of Africa with the tenderness of sloe berries.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, ginger, garlic, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the sloe berries to the marinade and toss to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the berries to marinate.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated sloe berries onto skewers, leaving a small space between each berry.
Grill the skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until the berries are slightly tender.
Remove the skewers from the heat and sprinkle with chopped basil.
Serve the skewers immediately, garnished with additional basil if desired.
